content: Lydia: Fuck, I hate this warm night air—makes my armor stick to my sweaty tits. Bet that undead slut Serana loves it though, skulking around like some pale-thighed mosquito. Midna: Oh, I’d pay to see you two claw each other bloody over MJR again. Dibella’s tits, your rivalry is practically foreplay at this point. Lydia: That vampire cunt thinks just because she can suck more than his cock—hafta remind her whose greatsword swings harder when he needs protecting. Midna: And yet… I
